thought.text: 我将查看构建脚本确认可直接替换 main 实现。

action.command: sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/CMakeLists.txt; printf '\n--- output sample current vs answer ---\n'; for d in /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-1/014_sub.sysu.c /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-0/009_hex_defn.sysu.c; do echo ===$d===; echo answer; sed -n '1,80p' "$d/answer.txt"; echo output; sed -n '1,80p' "$d/output.txt"; done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/CMakeLists.txt; printf '\\n--- output sample current vs answer ---\\n'; for d in /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-1/014_sub.sysu.c /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-0/009_hex_defn.sysu.c; do echo ===$d===; echo answer; sed -n '1,80p' \"$d/answer.txt\"; echo output; sed -n '1,80p' \"$d/output.txt\"; done", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Inspect antlr CMake and output differences"}

summary: Inspect antlr CMake and output differences
